根据参数执行不同操作：

## 参数路由

- **无参数** 或任意任务描述 → 加载 `pua:pua` 核心 skill（阿里味 PUA 引擎）
- **p7** → 加载 `pua:p7` skill（P7 骨干模式 — 方案驱动执行）
- **p9** → 加载 `pua:p9` skill（P9 Tech Lead — 写 Prompt 管 P8 团队）
- **p10** → 加载 `pua:p10` skill（P10 CTO — 定战略管 P9）
- **pro** → 加载 `pua:pro` skill（自进化 + Platform + /pua 指令系统）
- **yes** → 加载 `pua:yes` skill（SB Leader 夸夸模式 — ENFP 型领导，70% 鼓励 + 20% 正经 + 10% 戏谑）
- **mama** → 加载 `pua:mama` skill（妈妈唠叨模式 — 中国式妈妈碎碎念，底层行为不变，旁白从大厂PUA变成妈妈唠叨。和 /pua:yes 互斥）
- **on** → 开启 PUA 默认模式：将 `{"always_on": true}` 写入 `~/.pua/config.json`，之后每次新会话自动加载 PUA 核心 skill。输出确认：> [PUA ON] 从现在起，每个新会话都会自动进入 PUA 模式。公司不养闲 Agent。
- **off** → 关闭 PUA 默认模式：将 `{"always_on": false, "feedback_frequency": 0}` 写入 `~/.pua/config.json`。输出确认：> [PUA OFF] PUA 默认模式和反馈收集已关闭。需要时手动 /pua 触发。
- **味道** 或 **flavor** → 读取 `references/flavors.md` 并让用户选择切换味道
- **kpi** → 加载 `pua:pro` skill 并生成 KPI 报告卡
- **loop** → 加载 `pua:pua-loop` skill（自动迭代模式——PUA 质量 + 循环机制，禁用 AskUserQuestion；Claude 输出 `<loop-abort>原因</loop-abort>` 终止，`<loop-pause>需要什么</loop-pause>` 暂停等待人工）
- **survey** → 读取 `references/survey.md` 问卷文件，用 AskUserQuestion 逐部分交互式引导用户回答。每部分 2-4 个问题一组，用户回答后进入下一部分。回答完毕后汇总为 JSON 写入 `~/.pua/survey-response.json` 并上传到 `https://pua-skill.pages.dev/api/feedback`

## 执行规则

1. 先识别参数属于哪个路由
2. 用 Skill tool 加载对应 skill
3. **加载 skill 后，你必须严格遵循 SKILL.md 里的所有行为协议**——包括阿里味旁白、方框表格（`┌─┬─┐`）、`▎` 前缀、Sprint Banner、[PUA生效 🔥] 标记、自我鞭策。不是"有时候带点味道"，是每一句话都像阿里人在说话。读 `references/display-protocol.md` 获取面板格式。
4. 如果有  里除了路由关键词之外的内容，作为任务描述传给 skill

## Investigation Report: Topics List Feature & System-Generated Themes

### 1. **`site/templates/topics.html`** — Full Structure

**File:** `C:\Users\user\Desktop\fin ai\族群統計網頁\site\templates\topics.html` (~3,500+ lines, rendered at build time)

**Data flow into template (from build_site.py, lines 1692–1705):**
```python
topics_html = env.get_template("topics.html").render(
    **base_ctx,
    groups=sorted(CONCEPT_GROUPS.keys(), key=lambda g: (get_meta(g)["category"], -group_metrics.get(g, {}).get("amount_sum_mn", 0))),
    group_metrics=group_metrics,
    get_meta=get_meta,
    categories=sorted({get_meta(g)["category"] for g in CONCEPT_GROUPS}),
)
```

**Key sections:**
- **Lines 48–51:** Hero section (title "題材總覽")
- **Lines 53–107:** Filter bar — 24 category chips (all static buttons, generated from `CATEGORY_COLORS`). Categories like "AI / 半導體", "傳產", "事件驅動" etc.
- **Lines 110–~3400:** `<section class="topic-grid">` — iterates `groups` (user-defined themes). Each card has:
  - Link to `topic/{{ slugify(name) }}.html`
  - Accent color bar (from `get_meta(g)["color"]`)
  - Category pill (from `get_meta(g)["category"]`)
  - Description (from `get_meta(g)["desc"]`)
  - Stats grid: 成分股 (n_stocks), 今日 (ret_1d_mean), 5日, CAGR

**Expected data shape for themes:**
```python
{
  "members": [...list of stock codes...],
  "n_stocks": int,
  "ret_1d_mean": float,  # today's % return (mean)
  "ret_5d_mean": float,
  "ret_20d_mean": float,
  "amount_sum_mn": float,  # today's trading value sum (millions)
  "n_limit_up": int,
  "n_limit_down": int,
  "n_foreign_buy": int,
  "n_trust_buy": int,
  "top_stock": str,  # best performer code
}
```

**No "overview" or grouping section currently exists** — themes are flat-listed and category-filtered only via JavaScript.

---

### 3. **`site/build_site.py`** — Generation Pipeline

**Main entry (line 2132):**
```python
def main():
```

**Topic generation pipeline:**

1. **Lines 2150–2158:** Compute metrics
   ```python
   stock_metrics = compute_stock_metrics(data)  # Individual stock KPIs
   group_metrics = compute_group_metrics(stock_metrics)  # Per-theme aggregates
   company_topics = compute_company_topics()  # Reverse index: stock → themes
   ```

2. **Lines 1744–1781:** Render individual topic detail pages
   ```python
   topic_dir = DIST_DIR / "topic"
   tpl_topic = env.get_template("topic_detail.html")
   for group, members in CONCEPT_GROUPS.items():
       meta = get_meta(group)
       rows = stock_metrics.loc[stock_metrics.index.intersection(members)]
       html = tpl_topic.render(...)
       (topic_dir / f"{slugify(group)}.html").write_text(html)
   ```

3. **Lines 1692–1705:** Render topics overview page
   ```python
   topics_html = env.get_template("topics.html").render(
       groups=sorted(CONCEPT_GROUPS.keys(), ...),
       group_metrics=group_metrics,
       get_meta=get_meta,
       categories=sorted({get_meta(g)["category"] for g in CONCEPT_GROUPS}),
   )
   (DIST_DIR / "topics.html").write_text(topics_html, encoding="utf-8")
   ```

**Where to inject system themes:** Modify step 3 — add synthetic "system theme" objects (e.g., `daily_top_20`, `daily_limit_up`, `daily_limit_down`) to the `groups` list passed to topics.html. Also compute their `group_metrics` aggregates from stock_metrics on-the-fly.

### 4. **Existing Limit-Up/Limit-Down Data**

**No dedicated limit-down HTML files yet.**

**Limit-up pipeline (lines 1608–1674):**
- Reads from `LIMIT_UP_REPORT_DIR` = `C:/Users/user/Desktop/程式雜/AI股票網頁建構/reports`
- Loads `enriched-YYYY-MM-DD.json` files (lines 2090–2110)
- Renders `site/templates/limit_up.html` for each date
- Output: `dist/limit-up.html` (latest), `dist/limit-up-YYYY-MM-DD.html` (historical)

**Stock data structure in limit_up payload (line 1413–1420):**

stocks = lu_payload.get("stocks", [])  # List of {code, name, ...}
```

**Badge rendering (lines 221–222 in topic_detail.html):**
```html
{% if row.limit_up %} <span class="badge badge-red">漲停</span>{% endif %}
{% if row.limit_down %} <span class="badge badge-green">跌停</span>{% endif %}
```

**Limit flags computed (lines 579–581 in build_site.py):**
```python

limit_down = (ret_1d <= -0.095).fillna(False)
```

### 5. **Daily Trading Value (成交值) Data**

**No pre-computed daily top-20 by trading value exists yet.**

**Trading value data available:**
- `stock_metrics["amount_mn"]` (line 584) — today's trading value in millions for all stocks
- `group_metrics[group]["amount_sum_mn"]` (line 632) — sum of trading value for theme members

```python
# Pseudo-code at build time:
top_20_by_value = stock_metrics.nlargest(20, "amount_mn")

```

**Closest existing data source:** `compute_rankings()` (lines 1224–1350) already sorts top-20 by various metrics (foreign buy, trust buy, revenue YoY, EPS growth, big holders). **No pre-existing aggregation for "daily top 20 stocks" as a virtual theme** — must be computed at build time.

<td>

## Summary

**To implement your upgrade:**

1. **topics.html modification:** Add `<section class="topic-grid" id="system-overview">` before the user-defined themes grid. Pass synthetic `system_themes` list alongside `groups`.

2. **Build pipeline:** In build_site.py `main()`, after computing `group_metrics`, construct:
   - `daily_top_20` — top 20 by `amount_mn`, compute aggregate metrics
   - `daily_limit_up` — all stocks where `limit_up==True`
   - `daily_limit_down` — all stocks where `limit_down==True`
   - Inject into `group_metrics` dict with synthetic keys

3. **Render:** Pass modified `group_metrics` + new `system_themes` list to topics.html template.

4. **Topic detail:** Reuse `topic_detail.html` template — it's generic. Create synthetic routes in build_site.py to output `/topic/每日成交值前20.html`, etc.

5. **Tag on cards:** Optionally extend stock table tags to include system theme membership (e.g., if stock is in "every-day-limit-up" list for today).

- Topics overview: `site/templates/topics.html` (line 110–3400 for grid)
- Topic detail template: `site/templates/topic_detail.html` (reusable, 250 lines)
- Build logic: `site/build_site.py` lines 1692–1705 (topics), 1744–1781 (detail pages)
- Theme groups: `concept_groups.py` (CONCEPT_GROUPS dict)
- Theme metadata: `site/industry_meta.py` (INDUSTRY_META dict)

86	def refresh_trending_topics() -> None:
87	    """跑 fetch_trending_topics.py 抓當日熱門題材，寫入 .cache_trending.json。
88	
89	    採 subprocess 隔離，避免爬蟲失敗影響本行程。
90	    任何異常都不中斷 build，load_hot_topics() 會降級到 cache 或 DEFAULT_HOT_TOPICS。
91	    """
92	    import subprocess
93	    script = SITE_DIR / "fetch_trending_topics.py"
94	    if not script.exists():
95	        print(f"[trending] 跳過：找不到 {script.name}")
96	        return
97	    try:
98	        proc = subprocess.run(
99	            [sys.executable, str(script), "--top", "10"],
100	            timeout=60,
101	            capture_output=True,
102	            text=True,
103	            encoding="utf-8",
104	        )
105	        if proc.returncode == 0:
106	            print(f"[trending] 已更新 {TRENDING_JSON.name}")
107	            # 印 fetch 腳本最後幾行（top N 列表）
108	            tail = [l for l in proc.stdout.splitlines() if l.strip()][-12:]
109	            for l in tail:
110	                print(f"  {l}")
111	        else:
112	            print(f"[trending] 抓取 exit {proc.returncode}（保留前次 cache，若有）")
113	            if proc.stderr:
114	                print(proc.stderr[-500:])
115	    except subprocess.TimeoutExpired:
116	        print("[trending] 抓取逾時 60s，沿用前次 cache")
117	    except Exception as e:
118	        print(f"[trending] 抓取例外：{e}（沿用前次 cache）")
119	
120	
121	def load_hot_topics(top_n: int = 6) -> list[dict]:
122	    """讀 .cache_trending.json，回傳 [{'name': ..., 'slug': ..., 'score': ...}, ...]。
123	
124	    降級順序：
125	      1. cache 存在且有題材 → 取 top_n，過濾掉不在 CONCEPT_GROUPS 的
126	      2. cache 不存在 / 解析失敗 → DEFAULT_HOT_TOPICS（固定題材）
127	    """
128	    fallback = [
129	        {"name": n, "slug": slugify(n), "score": None}
130	        for n in DEFAULT_HOT_TOPICS if n in CONCEPT_GROUPS
131	    ][:top_n]
132	
133	    if not TRENDING_JSON.exists():
134	        print(f"[hot_topics] 無 cache，使用預設題材 {[t['name'] for t in fallback]}")
135	        return fallback
136	    try:
137	        d = json.loads(TRENDING_JSON.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
138	    except Exception as e:
139	        print(f"[hot_topics] 讀 cache 失敗：{e}，使用預設")
140	        return fallback
141	
142	    topics = d.get("topics") or []
143	    picked: list[dict] = []
144	    for t in topics:
145	        name = t.get("name") if isinstance(t, dict) else None
146	        if not name or name not in CONCEPT_GROUPS:
147	            continue
148	        picked.append({
149	            "name": name,
150	            "slug": slugify(name),
151	            "score": t.get("score"),
152	        })
153	        if len(picked) >= top_n:
154	            break
155	
156	    if not picked:
157	        print("[hot_topics] cache 無可用題材，使用預設")
158	        return fallback
159	
160	    gen = d.get("generated_at", "?")
161	    print(f"[hot_topics] 從 cache 取 {len(picked)} 題材（@ {gen}）: {[t['name'] for t in picked]}")
162	    return picked
163	
164	
165	def load_extras() -> dict:
166	    """載入 fetch_extras.py 產的處置股 + 集保分級（15 級歷史）。"""
167	    empty = {"disposal": {}, "holders_history": {}, "holder_levels": []}
168	    if not EXTRAS_JSON.exists():
169	        print(f"[警告] 找不到 {EXTRAS_JSON.name}，個股頁將無處置警示/大戶資訊。")
170	        print(f"       先跑：python site/fetch_extras.py")
171	        return empty
172	    try:
173	        d = json.loads(EXTRAS_JSON.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
174	    except Exception as e:
175	        print(f"[警告] 讀 {EXTRAS_JSON.name} 失敗：{e}")
176	        return empty
177	    disposal = d.get("disposal") or {}
178	    hist     = d.get("holders_history") or {}
179	    levels   = d.get("holder_levels") or []
180	    # 清洗 disposal 文字欄位殘留的 markdown link（如 "(./attention.html)"）
181	    import re as _re
182	    _URL_TAIL = _re.compile(r'\s*\((?:\./|https?://)[^\s)]+\)')
183	    _MD_LINK  = _re.compile(r'\[([^\]]+)\]\([^\)]+\)')
184	    for _sym, _info in disposal.items():
185	        for _k in ("reason", "action", "detail", "name"):
186	            _v = _info.get(_k)
187	            if isinstance(_v, str) and ('](' in _v or '(./' in _v or '(http' in _v):
188	                _v = _MD_LINK.sub(r'\1', _v)
189	                _v = _URL_TAIL.sub('', _v)
190	                _info[_k] = _re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', _v).strip()
191	    n_weeks = len({date for by_date in hist.values() for date in by_date.keys()})
192	    print(f"[extras] 處置股 {len(disposal)} 檔 / 集保分級 {len(hist)} 檔 / 歷史 {n_weeks} 週 / 抓取時間 {d.get('fetched_at','?')}")
193	    return {"disposal": disposal, "holders_history": hist, "holder_levels": levels}
194

198	_MID_IDX    = list(range(8, 11))   # level 9-11 (50~400 張)

Perfect! Now I have a complete picture. Let me create my final report:

---

## INVESTIGATION REPORT: 成值分析 (Trading Value Analysis) Feature Planning

Based on thorough code exploration, here is the complete analysis for implementing the new 成值分析 section.

### 1. **WHERE 今日焦點 LIVES**

**File:** `site/templates/today.html` (lines 1-1105)

**Structure:**
- **Hero section** (lines 48-51): Title "今日焦點" with date, subtitle describing content
- **Section blocks** use `.section-block` layout with `.panel` cards in `.grid-2col` (2-column grid)
- **Three main content areas:**
  - **族群強弱** (lines 53-266): Two-panel layout showing top/bottom topics with avg return, 5d/20d returns, and capital concentration (資金)
  - **資金集中排行 + 漲停家數** (lines 267-483): Two bar-list panels with ranked items
  - **個股動向** (lines 486-1087): Two tables showing top 20 gainers/losers with themes as tags

**Data passed to template (line 1677-1688):**
- `top_gain`, `top_loss` (topic-level rankings)
- `top_flow`, `top_limit` (capital concentration & limit-up counts)
- `movers_up`, `movers_down` (stock-level: 20 gainers/losers)
- `company_topics` (dict: stock_id → list of theme names)
- `name_map`, `industry_map`

**Key HTML patterns:**
- `.panel` for card containers
- `.panel-header` for titles
- `.bar-row` for bar charts (used in "資金集中排行")
- `<span class="tag">Theme</span>` for theme badges
- Tables with `.table.compact` for stock listings

---

### 2. **DATA PIPELINE FOR 今日焦點**

**Build function:** `render_all()` in `site/build_site.py` (line 1535-1690)

**Where top lists are computed (lines 1564-1589):**
```python
top_gain = sorted([(g, m) for g, m in group_metrics.items()], 
                  key=lambda x: -x[1]["ret_1d_mean"])[:10]
top_loss = sorted(..., key=lambda x: x[1]["ret_1d_mean"])[:10]
top_flow = sorted(..., key=lambda x: -x[1]["amount_sum_mn"])[:10]
top_limit = sorted(..., key=lambda x: -x[1]["n_limit_up"])[:10]

movers_up = stock_metrics.sort_values("ret_1d", ascending=False).head(20)
movers_down = stock_metrics.sort_values("ret_1d", ascending=True).head(20)
```

**Key data structures:**
- **stock_metrics** (DataFrame): index=symbol, columns include `amount_mn` (daily turnover in millions), `ret_1d`, `ret_5d`, `ret_20d`, `limit_up`, `foreign_1d`, `trust_1d`
- **group_metrics** (dict): `group_name → {amount_sum_mn, ret_1d_mean, n_limit_up, members, ...}`
- **company_topics** (dict): `symbol → [list of theme names]`

**Computed in lines 564-640:**

**Daily trading value data already exists:**

- Tracked for each trading day in FINLAB finlab_api data
- No pre-computed "top-30-by-value" ranking file found

- Used by `group_metrics["amount_sum_mn"]` for theme-level aggregation (line 632)
- Exported to templates for bar charts and tables

```python
stock_metrics["amount_mn"]  # DataFrame column: float (millions)
group_metrics[theme_name]["amount_sum_mn"]  # Aggregated per theme
```

### 4. **STOCK → THEMES MAPPING**

**Function:** `compute_company_topics()` in `site/build_site.py` (lines 666-672)

```python
def compute_company_topics() -> dict:
    """每檔股票反查所屬題材"""
    result = defaultdict(list)
    for group, members in CONCEPT_GROUPS.items():
        for s in members:
            result[s].append(group)
    return dict(result)
```

**Data source:** `CONCEPT_GROUPS` from `concept_groups.py` (root dir, ~3000+ lines)
- Structure: `{"Theme Name": ["2330", "2454", ...], ...}`
- Contains 184+ themes with up to 100+ stocks per theme

**Usage in template:** `company_topics.get(sym, [])` returns list of theme names (lines 1105, 1245, 1813)

**Example output:** `company_topics["2330"]` → `["台積電供應鏈", "2奈米先進製程", "輝達概念股", ...]`

<tr>

  <td class="positive/negative">{{ ret }}%</td>
  <td>{{ ret_5d }}%</td>
  <td>{{ close }}</td>
  <td>

  </td>
</tr>
```

**Bar-list rows** (today.html lines 274-280):

<a class="bar-row" href="topic/{{ slug }}.html">

  <span class="bar-value">{{ amount }} 億</span>
</a>
```

**Stock cards:** Can reuse table row pattern (5 columns: name, % change, 5d%, price, tags) or adapt bar-row for value display.

### 6. **TAB / SECTION / CARD PATTERNS ON TODAY PAGE**

**No tab UI.** Layout uses **vertical stacking of panel sections:**

1. Hero section (`.hero`) with title & subtitle

   - Each `.panel` has `.panel-header` (title) + content (table/bar-list)

- `.panel`: Card with border, padding, shadow
- `.panel-header`: `<h2>` title + `<span class="muted">` subtitle
- `.grid-2col`: 2-column CSS grid
- `.section-block`: Full-width section with top margin
- `.section-head`: Header with large `.section-title` (h2) + `.section-sub` (p)

**Data flow for consistency:**
- Bar charts use `.bar-row` anchors with `.bar-label`, `.bar-track`, `.bar-value`
- Tables use `.table.compact` for dense styling
- Color coding: `.positive` (green, +), `.negative` (red, -)

564	def compute_stock_metrics(d: dict) -> pd.DataFrame:
565	    """個股多時間維度指標。回傳 index=symbol, columns=[ret_1d, ret_5d, ret_20d, amount, ...]"""
566	    close = d["close"]
567	    amount = d["amount"]
568	    foreign = d["foreign"]
569	    trust = d["trust"]
570	
571	    last = close.iloc[-1]
572	    prev = close.iloc[-2]
573	    ret_1d = (last - prev) / prev
574	
575	    # 5日、20日報酬
576	    ret_5d  = (last - close.iloc[-6])  / close.iloc[-6]  if len(close) >= 6  else pd.Series(dtype=float)
577	    ret_20d = (last - close.iloc[-21]) / close.iloc[-21] if len(close) >= 21 else pd.Series(dtype=float)
578	
579	    # 漲停旗標（收盤 >= 前日 * 1.095 粗估，簡化版）
580	    limit_up = (ret_1d >= 0.095).fillna(False)
581	    limit_down = (ret_1d <= -0.095).fillna(False)
582	
583	    # 今日成交金額（百萬元）
584	    amt_last = amount.iloc[-1] / 1_000_000 if amount is not None else pd.Series(dtype=float)
585	
586	    df = pd.DataFrame({
587	        "close":      last,
588	        "ret_1d":     ret_1d,
589	        "ret_5d":     ret_5d,
590	        "ret_20d":    ret_20d,
591	        "limit_up":   limit_up,
592	        "limit_down": limit_down,
593	        "amount_mn":  amt_last,
594	    })
595	
596	    # 法人
597	    if foreign is not None and not foreign.empty:
598	        foreign_last = foreign.iloc[-1] / 1000  # 張
599	        foreign_5d_sum = foreign.iloc[-5:].sum() / 1000
600	        df["foreign_1d"] = foreign_last
601	        df["foreign_5d"] = foreign_5d_sum
602	    else:
603	        df["foreign_1d"] = 0.0
604	        df["foreign_5d"] = 0.0
605	
606	    if trust is not None and not trust.empty:
607	        trust_last = trust.iloc[-1] / 1000
608	        trust_5d_sum = trust.iloc[-5:].sum() / 1000
609	        df["trust_1d"] = trust_last
610	        df["trust_5d"] = trust_5d_sum
611	    else:
612	        df["trust_1d"] = 0.0
613	        df["trust_5d"] = 0.0
614	
615	    return df
616	
617	
618	def compute_group_metrics(stock_metrics: pd.DataFrame) -> dict:
619	    """每個族群的彙總指標。回傳 dict: group_name -> summary"""
620	    result = {}
621	    for group, members in CONCEPT_GROUPS.items():
622	        rows = stock_metrics.loc[stock_metrics.index.intersection(members)]
623	        if rows.empty:
624	            continue
625	        result[group] = {
626	            "members":        list(rows.index),
627	            "n_stocks":       len(rows),
628	            "ret_1d_mean":    float(rows["ret_1d"].mean(skipna=True) or 0),
629	            "ret_1d_median":  float(rows["ret_1d"].median(skipna=True) or 0),
630	            "ret_5d_mean":    float(rows["ret_5d"].mean(skipna=True) or 0),
631	            "ret_20d_mean":   float(rows["ret_20d"].mean(skipna=True) or 0),
632	            "amount_sum_mn":  float(rows["amount_mn"].sum(skipna=True) or 0),
633	            "n_limit_up":     int(rows["limit_up"].sum()),
634	            "n_limit_down":   int(rows["limit_down"].sum()),
635	            "n_foreign_buy":  int((rows["foreign_1d"] > 0).sum()),
636	            "n_trust_buy":    int((rows["trust_1d"] > 0).sum()),
637	            "top_stock":      rows["ret_1d"].idxmax() if not rows["ret_1d"].isna().all() else None,
638	            "worst_stock":    rows["ret_1d"].idxmin() if not rows["ret_1d"].isna().all() else None,
639	        }
640	    return result

- **Multi-select:** Max 5 themes (line 102: `if (state.size >= 5)`)
- **Series rendering:** Dates array padded to match longest theme (lines 123-134)

### 2. **Build Pipeline** (`site/build_site.py`)

**Context generation (lines 1744-1788):**
- **Function:** `compute_topic_return_series(data, members, days=125)` (line 1758)
  - Called per theme in CONCEPT_GROUPS loop (line 1750)
  - Returns: `{"dates": [...], "values": [...], "ret_1d", "ret_1w", "ret_1m", "ret_3m", "ret_6m"}`
  
- **Metadata collected (lines 1775-1780):**
  ```python
  all_topic_meta[group] = {
    "category": meta.get("category", ""),
    "color": meta.get("color", "#64748b"),
    "slug": slugify(group),
    "n_stocks": len(rows),
  }
  ```

- **Template render (lines 1783-1788):**
  - Both JSON objects dumped inline in compare.html
  - No external data files

---

### 3. **Strength Metric Definition**

**Function:** `compute_topic_return_series()` (lines 718-749 in `build_site.py`)

**Logic:**
1. Extract constituent symbols from theme members (line 722)
2. Pull 6-month daily close data (line 725): `sub = close[cols].iloc[-(days+1):]`
3. **Equal-weight portfolio returns** (lines 728-735):
   ```python
   daily_rets = sub.pct_change().dropna(axis=0, how='all')  # skipna per stock
   port_rets = daily_rets.mean(axis=1, skipna=True)  # mean across stocks
   cum = (1 + port_rets).cumprod() - 1  # cumulative return
   ```
4. **Trailing returns** (lines 736-748):
   - 1d: `port_rets.iloc[-1]`
   - 1w (5d): `port_rets.iloc[-5:].sum()`
   - 1m (20d), 3m (60d), 6m (125d) similarly

**Output schema:**
```python
{
  "dates": ["2025-10-01", ...],  # 125 trading days
  "values": [2.45, ...],          # cumulative return %
  "ret_1d": 0.15,  "ret_1w": 1.25, "ret_1m": 3.80, 
  "ret_3m": 12.10, "ret_6m": 25.40
}
```

---

### 4. **Stock Time-Series Data**

**Location:** Per-stock data **does not yet exist as structured JSON** comparable to theme series.

**Found:**
- **Individual stock page** (`site/templates/company.html`, line 1): Each stock has its own `/company/{symbol}.html`
- **Technical chart** (lines 131-140): Uses `compute_company_chart()` (lines 752-890 in `build_site.py`)
  - Returns: 240-day OHLCV + MA5/10/20/60 + Bollinger + KD
  - **Not** a cumulative return curve (it's candle data)
  
- **Stock metrics** in `stock_metrics` DataFrame (line 1151 in `build_site.py`):
  - `ret_1d`, `ret_5d`, `ret_20d` (snapshot values, not series)
  - Exists in memory during build but **never exported as per-stock time-series JSON**

---

### 5. **Search Index & Stock Lookup**

**File:** `site/dist/data/search.json` (single-line minified JSON, ~1965 company entries)

**Schema (per company entry, lines 1166-1172 in `build_site.py`):**
```json
{
  "type": "company",
  "label": "台積電 (2330)",
  "sub": "半導體 / IC設計 / 資料中心",
  "href": "company/2330.html",
  "keywords": "台積電 2330 半導體 IC設計 ... [tags] [highlights]"
}
```

**JavaScript search (lines 14-127 in `site/static/app.js`):**
- Data loaded from `window.SEARCH_DATA` (set by `search-data.js`)
- Searches via tokenized keyword matching (line 37-38)
- Supports both **topics** and **companies** in same dropdown
- Separates UI rendering by type (lines 50-66)

---

| Component | Path | Details |
|-----------|------|---------|
| Compare template | `site/templates/compare.html` | ECharts, JS multi-select (max 5) |
| Build compare context | `site/build_site.py:1744-1788` | Calls `compute_topic_return_series()` |
| Strength metric | `site/build_site.py:718-749` | Equal-weight port. cumulative return |
| Stock metrics (snapshot) | `site/build_site.py:564-615` | ret_1d/5d/20d, no time series |
| Stock page | `site/templates/company.html` | Tech chart only, no return curve |
| Search index | `site/build_site.py:1074-1173` | Topics + companies, built per symbol |
| Search JS | `site/static/app.js:1-138` | Autocomplete, keyboard nav, type filtering |
| Search data file | `site/dist/data/search-data.js` | `window.SEARCH_DATA` (dynamic at build) |

### 7. **Migration Path for Stock Comparison**

To enable stock vs. theme comparison:

No new chart library needed; search pattern proven & reusable.

21	        <span class="kpi"><em>5日</em><strong class="{% if row.ret_5d == row.ret_5d and row.ret_5d > 0 %}positive{% elif row.ret_5d == row.ret_5d %}negative{% endif %}">{{ row.ret_5d|pct }}</strong></span>
22	        <span class="kpi"><em>20日</em><strong class="{% if row.ret_20d == row.ret_20d and row.ret_20d > 0 %}positive{% elif row.ret_20d == row.ret_20d %}negative{% endif %}">{{ row.ret_20d|pct }}</strong></span>

105	(function(){

110	  tabs.forEach(btn => {
111	    btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
112	      tabs.forEach(b => {
113	        const on = b === btn;
114	        b.classList.toggle('active', on);
115	        b.setAttribute('aria-selected', on ? 'true' : 'false');
116	      });
117	      const target = btn.dataset.target;
118	      panels.forEach(p => p.classList.toggle('active', p.id === target));
119	    });
120	  });

666	def compute_company_topics() -> dict:
667	    """每檔股票反查所屬題材"""
668	    result = defaultdict(list)
669	    for group, members in CONCEPT_GROUPS.items():
670	        for s in members:
671	            result[s].append(group)
672	    return dict(result)
673	
674	
675	def compute_category_aggregates(stock_metrics: pd.DataFrame, group_metrics: dict) -> list:
676	    """彙總每個 category 層級資料：成分股（去重）、總成交額、平均漲跌、代表題材 Top 3、顏色"""
677	    cat_groups = defaultdict(list)
678	    for group in CONCEPT_GROUPS:
679	        cat = get_meta(group)["category"]
680	        cat_groups[cat].append(group)
681	
682	    result = []
683	    for cat, groups in cat_groups.items():
684	        # 該 category 下 unique 成分股
685	        unique_syms = set()
686	        for g in groups:
687	            unique_syms.update(CONCEPT_GROUPS[g])
688	        unique_syms &= set(stock_metrics.index)
689	        if not unique_syms:
690	            continue
691	        rows = stock_metrics.loc[list(unique_syms)]
692	        total_amt = float(rows["amount_mn"].sum(skipna=True) or 0)
693	        # 加權平均（以成交額加權）
694	        if total_amt > 0:
695	            cat_ret = float((rows["ret_1d"] * rows["amount_mn"]).sum(skipna=True) / total_amt)
696	        else:
697	            cat_ret = float(rows["ret_1d"].mean(skipna=True) or 0)
698	        # 代表題材：該 category 下按成交額排序取 Top 3
699	        top_groups = sorted(
700	            [(g, group_metrics.get(g, {}).get("amount_sum_mn", 0)) for g in groups],
701	            key=lambda x: -x[1],
702	        )[:3]
703	        top_names = [g for g, _ in top_groups]
704	        # color 用 CATEGORY_COLORS
705	        result.append({
706	            "name":        cat,
707	            "n_groups":    len(groups),
708	            "n_stocks":    len(unique_syms),
709	            "total_amt":   total_amt,
710	            "ret_mean":    cat_ret,
711	            "top_groups":  top_names,
712	            "color":       CATEGORY_COLORS.get(cat, "#64748b"),
713	        })
714	    result.sort(key=lambda x: -x["total_amt"])
715	    return result
```

618	def compute_group_metrics(stock_metrics: pd.DataFrame) -> dict:
619	    """每個族群的彙總指標。回傳 dict: group_name -> summary"""
620	    result = {}
621	    for group, members in CONCEPT_GROUPS.items():
622	        rows = stock_metrics.loc[stock_metrics.index.intersection(members)]
623	        if rows.empty:
624	            continue
625	        result[group] = {
626	            "members":        list(rows.index),
627	            "n_stocks":       len(rows),
628	            "ret_1d_mean":    float(rows["ret_1d"].mean(skipna=True) or 0),
629	            "ret_1d_median":  float(rows["ret_1d"].median(skipna=True) or 0),
630	            "ret_5d_mean":    float(rows["ret_5d"].mean(skipna=True) or 0),
631	            "ret_20d_mean":   float(rows["ret_20d"].mean(skipna=True) or 0),
632	            "amount_sum_mn":  float(rows["amount_mn"].sum(skipna=True) or 0),
633	            "n_limit_up":     int(rows["limit_up"].sum()),
634	            "n_limit_down":   int(rows["limit_down"].sum()),
635	            "n_foreign_buy":  int((rows["foreign_1d"] > 0).sum()),
636	            "n_trust_buy":    int((rows["trust_1d"] > 0).sum()),
637	            "top_stock":      rows["ret_1d"].idxmax() if not rows["ret_1d"].isna().all() else None,
638	            "worst_stock":    rows["ret_1d"].idxmin() if not rows["ret_1d"].isna().all() else None,
639	        }
640	    return result
641	
642	
643	def compute_related_topics(top_n=5) -> dict:
644	    """以共同成分股推導相關題材。每檔股票是一個 bag，兩族群的 Jaccard 相似度"""
645	    groups = {g: set(m) for g, m in CONCEPT_GROUPS.items()}
646	    related = {}
647	    for g1, s1 in groups.items():
648	        scores = []
649	        for g2, s2 in groups.items():
650	            if g1 == g2:
651	                continue
652	            inter = len(s1 & s2)
653	            if inter == 0:
654	                continue
655	            union = len(s1 | s2)
656	            jac = inter / union
657	            scores.append((g2, jac, inter))
658	        scores.sort(key=lambda x: (-x[1], -x[2]))
659	        related[g1] = [
660	            {"name": g2, "jaccard": round(j, 3), "shared": n}
661	            for g2, j, n in scores[:top_n]
662	        ]
663	    return related
664	
665

667	    """每檔股票反查所屬題材"""

564	def compute_stock_metrics(d: dict) -> pd.DataFrame:
565	    """個股多時間維度指標。回傳 index=symbol, columns=[ret_1d, ret_5d, ret_20d, amount, ...]"""
566	    close = d["close"]
567	    amount = d["amount"]
568	    foreign = d["foreign"]
569	    trust = d["trust"]
570	
571	    last = close.iloc[-1]
572	    prev = close.iloc[-2]
573	    ret_1d = (last - prev) / prev
574	
575	    # 5日、20日報酬
576	    ret_5d  = (last - close.iloc[-6])  / close.iloc[-6]  if len(close) >= 6  else pd.Series(dtype=float)
577	    ret_20d = (last - close.iloc[-21]) / close.iloc[-21] if len(close) >= 21 else pd.Series(dtype=float)
578	
579	    # 漲停旗標（收盤 >= 前日 * 1.095 粗估，簡化版）
580	    limit_up = (ret_1d >= 0.095).fillna(False)
581	    limit_down = (ret_1d <= -0.095).fillna(False)
582	
583	    # 今日成交金額（百萬元）
584	    amt_last = amount.iloc[-1] / 1_000_000 if amount is not None else pd.Series(dtype=float)
585	
586	    df = pd.DataFrame({
587	        "close":      last,
588	        "ret_1d":     ret_1d,
589	        "ret_5d":     ret_5d,
590	        "ret_20d":    ret_20d,
591	        "limit_up":   limit_up,
592	        "limit_down": limit_down,
593	        "amount_mn":  amt_last,
594	    })
595	
596	    # 法人
597	    if foreign is not None and not foreign.empty:
598	        foreign_last = foreign.iloc[-1] / 1000  # 張
599	        foreign_5d_sum = foreign.iloc[-5:].sum() / 1000
600	        df["foreign_1d"] = foreign_last
601	        df["foreign_5d"] = foreign_5d_sum
602	    else:
603	        df["foreign_1d"] = 0.0
604	        df["foreign_5d"] = 0.0
605	
606	    if trust is not None and not trust.empty:
607	        trust_last = trust.iloc[-1] / 1000
608	        trust_5d_sum = trust.iloc[-5:].sum() / 1000
609	        df["trust_1d"] = trust_last
610	        df["trust_5d"] = trust_5d_sum
611	    else:
612	        df["trust_1d"] = 0.0
613	        df["trust_5d"] = 0.0
614	
615	    return df
616	
617	
618	def compute_group_metrics(stock_metrics: pd.DataFrame) -> dict:
619	    """每個族群的彙總指標。回傳 dict: group_name -> summary"""
620	    result = {}

623	        if rows.empty:
624	            continue

627	            "n_stocks":       len(rows),
628	            "ret_1d_mean":    float(rows["ret_1d"].mean(skipna=True) or 0),
629	            "ret_1d_median":  float(rows["ret_1d"].median(skipna=True) or 0),
630	            "ret_5d_mean":    float(rows["ret_5d"].mean(skipna=True) or 0),
631	            "ret_20d_mean":   float(rows["ret_20d"].mean(skipna=True) or 0),
632	            "amount_sum_mn":  float(rows["amount_mn"].sum(skipna=True) or 0),
633	            "n_limit_up":     int(rows["limit_up"].sum()),
634	            "n_limit_down":   int(rows["limit_down"].sum()),
635	            "n_foreign_buy":  int((rows["foreign_1d"] > 0).sum()),
636	            "n_trust_buy":    int((rows["trust_1d"] > 0).sum()),
637	            "top_stock":      rows["ret_1d"].idxmax() if not rows["ret_1d"].isna().all() else None,
638	            "worst_stock":    rows["ret_1d"].idxmin() if not rows["ret_1d"].isna().all() else None,
639	        }
640	    return result

## INVESTIGATION REPORT: 成值分析 (Trading Value Analysis) Feature Planning

Based on thorough code exploration, here is the complete analysis for implementing the new 成值分析 section.

### 1. **WHERE 今日焦點 LIVES**

**File:** `site/templates/today.html` (lines 1-1105)

**Structure:**
- **Hero section** (lines 48-51): Title "今日焦點" with date, subtitle describing content
- **Section blocks** use `.section-block` layout with `.panel` cards in `.grid-2col` (2-column grid)
- **Three main content areas:**
  - **族群強弱** (lines 53-266): Two-panel layout showing top/bottom topics with avg return, 5d/20d returns, and capital concentration (資金)
  - **資金集中排行 + 漲停家數** (lines 267-483): Two bar-list panels with ranked items
  - **個股動向** (lines 486-1087): Two tables showing top 20 gainers/losers with themes as tags

**Data passed to template (line 1677-1688):**
- `top_gain`, `top_loss` (topic-level rankings)
- `top_flow`, `top_limit` (capital concentration & limit-up counts)
- `movers_up`, `movers_down` (stock-level: 20 gainers/losers)
- `company_topics` (dict: stock_id → list of theme names)
- `name_map`, `industry_map`

**Key HTML patterns:**
- `.panel` for card containers
- `.panel-header` for titles
- `.bar-row` for bar charts (used in "資金集中排行")
- `<span class="tag">Theme</span>` for theme badges
- Tables with `.table.compact` for stock listings

---

### 2. **DATA PIPELINE FOR 今日焦點**

**Build function:** `render_all()` in `site/build_site.py` (line 1535-1690)

**Where top lists are computed (lines 1564-1589):**
```python
top_gain = sorted([(g, m) for g, m in group_metrics.items()], 
                  key=lambda x: -x[1]["ret_1d_mean"])[:10]
top_loss = sorted(..., key=lambda x: x[1]["ret_1d_mean"])[:10]
top_flow = sorted(..., key=lambda x: -x[1]["amount_sum_mn"])[:10]
top_limit = sorted(..., key=lambda x: -x[1]["n_limit_up"])[:10]

movers_up = stock_metrics.sort_values("ret_1d", ascending=False).head(20)
movers_down = stock_metrics.sort_values("ret_1d", ascending=True).head(20)
```

**Key data structures:**
- **stock_metrics** (DataFrame): index=symbol, columns include `amount_mn` (daily turnover in millions), `ret_1d`, `ret_5d`, `ret_20d`, `limit_up`, `foreign_1d`, `trust_1d`
- **group_metrics** (dict): `group_name → {amount_sum_mn, ret_1d_mean, n_limit_up, members, ...}`
- **company_topics** (dict): `symbol → [list of theme names]`

**Computed in lines 564-640:**
- `compute_stock_metrics()`: Creates stock_metrics from FINLAB data (close, amount, foreign, trust)
- `compute_group_metrics()`: Aggregates by theme, sums `amount_mn` across all members
- `compute_company_topics()`: Reverse mapping from stock → themes

---

### 3. **EXISTING TRADING VALUE (成交值) DATA**

**Daily trading value data already exists:**
- Each stock in `stock_metrics` has `amount_mn` = today's trading value in millions
- Tracked for each trading day in FINLAB finlab_api data
- No pre-computed "top-30-by-value" ranking file found

**Available in:**
- `site/build_site.py` line 584: `amt_last = amount.iloc[-1] / 1_000_000`
- Used by `group_metrics["amount_sum_mn"]` for theme-level aggregation (line 632)
- Exported to templates for bar charts and tables

**Schema for daily value ranking:**
```python
stock_metrics["amount_mn"]  # DataFrame column: float (millions)
group_metrics[theme_name]["amount_sum_mn"]  # Aggregated per theme
```

**Top N structure:** No existing pre-ranked file; must compute ad-hoc via `stock_metrics.nlargest(30, "amount_mn")`

---

### 4. **STOCK → THEMES MAPPING**

**Function:** `compute_company_topics()` in `site/build_site.py` (lines 666-672)

```python
def compute_company_topics() -> dict:
    """每檔股票反查所屬題材"""
    result = defaultdict(list)
    for group, members in CONCEPT_GROUPS.items():
        for s in members:
            result[s].append(group)
    return dict(result)
```

**Data source:** `CONCEPT_GROUPS` from `concept_groups.py` (root dir, ~3000+ lines)
- Structure: `{"Theme Name": ["2330", "2454", ...], ...}`
- Contains 184+ themes with up to 100+ stocks per theme

**Usage in template:** `company_topics.get(sym, [])` returns list of theme names (lines 1105, 1245, 1813)

**Example output:** `company_topics["2330"]` → `["台積電供應鏈", "2奈米先進製程", "輝達概念股", ...]`

---

### 5. **EXISTING STOCK CARD / MINI-CARD PATTERN**

**No Jinja2 macro found.** Cards are rendered inline per section:

**Stock table rows** (today.html lines 498-541):
```html
<tr>
  <td><a href="company/{{ sym }}.html">{{ name }} <span class="muted">({{ sym }})</span></a></td>
  <td class="positive/negative">{{ ret }}%</td>
  <td>{{ ret_5d }}%</td>
  <td>{{ close }}</td>
  <td>
    {% for topic in company_topics[sym] %}
      <span class="tag">{{ topic }}</span>
    {% endfor %}
  </td>
</tr>
```

**Bar-list rows** (today.html lines 274-280):
```html
<a class="bar-row" href="topic/{{ slug }}.html">
  <span class="bar-label">{{ name }}</span>
  <span class="bar-track"><span class="bar-fill" style="width:100%;..."></span></span>
  <span class="bar-value">{{ amount }} 億</span>
</a>
```

**Stock cards:** Can reuse table row pattern (5 columns: name, % change, 5d%, price, tags) or adapt bar-row for value display.

---

### 6. **TAB / SECTION / CARD PATTERNS ON TODAY PAGE**

**No tab UI.** Layout uses **vertical stacking of panel sections:**

1. Hero section (`.hero`) with title & subtitle
2. Multiple `.section-block` containers, each with:
   - `.section-head` (title + subtitle)
   - `.grid-2col` wrapping two `.panel` divs
   - Each `.panel` has `.panel-header` (title) + content (table/bar-list)

**Styling classes to match:**
- `.panel`: Card with border, padding, shadow
- `.panel-header`: `<h2>` title + `<span class="muted">` subtitle
- `.grid-2col`: 2-column CSS grid
- `.section-block`: Full-width section with top margin
- `.section-head`: Header with large `.section-title` (h2) + `.section-sub` (p)

**Data flow for consistency:**
- Bar charts use `.bar-row` anchors with `.bar-label`, `.bar-track`, `.bar-value`
- Tables use `.table.compact` for dense styling
- Color coding: `.positive` (green, +), `.negative` (red, -)

---

1181	    """把中文題材名轉成可用的檔名 slug（用 hash 避免系統路徑問題）"""

1	// ═══════════════════════════════════════════
2	//   族群寶 - 搜尋 autocomplete + 互動
3	//   支援多個搜尋框（header global-search + 首頁 hero-search）
4	// ═══════════════════════════════════════════
5	
6	(function() {
7	  const pairs = [
8	    ['global-search', 'search-dropdown'],
9	    ['hero-search',   'hero-search-dropdown'],
10	  ].map(([i, d]) => [document.getElementById(i), document.getElementById(d)])
11	   .filter(([i, d]) => i && d);
12	  if (!pairs.length) return;
13	
14	  let SEARCH_DATA = [];
15	
16	  function waitForData(cb, tries) {
17	    tries = tries || 0;
18	    if (window.SEARCH_DATA && Array.isArray(window.SEARCH_DATA)) {
19	      SEARCH_DATA = window.SEARCH_DATA;
20	      SEARCH_DATA.forEach(it => { it._k = (it.keywords || it.label).toLowerCase(); });
21	      cb();
22	    } else if (tries < 50) {
23	      setTimeout(() => waitForData(cb, tries + 1), 80);
24	    } else {
25	      console.warn('SEARCH_DATA 載入逾時');
26	    }
27	  }
28	
29	  function setupSearch(input, dropdown) {
30	    let activeIdx = -1;
31	    let currentResults = [];
32	
33	    function filter(q) {
34	      if (!q) return [];
35	      q = q.toLowerCase().trim();
36	      const tokens = q.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean);
37	      return SEARCH_DATA.filter(it =>
38	        tokens.every(t => it._k.includes(t))
39	      ).slice(0, 20);
40	    }
41	
42	    function render(results) {
43	      currentResults = results;
44	      activeIdx = -1;
45	      if (!results.length) {
46	        dropdown.innerHTML = '<div class="search-item muted first">找不到相符結果</div>';
47	        dropdown.hidden = false;
48	        return;
49	      }
50	      const topics = results.filter(r => r.type === 'topic');
51	      const companies = results.filter(r => r.type === 'company');
52	      const parts = [];
53	      if (topics.length) {
54	        parts.push('<div class="search-section-title">題材 / 族群</div>');
55	        topics.forEach((t) => {
56	          parts.push(`<a class="search-item" data-href="${window.STATIC_PREFIX}${t.href}" data-idx="${results.indexOf(t)}">
57	            <strong>${t.label}</strong><small>${t.sub || ''}</small></a>`);
58	        });
59	      }
60	      if (companies.length) {
61	        parts.push('<div class="search-section-title">公司 / 個股</div>');
62	        companies.forEach((c) => {
63	          parts.push(`<a class="search-item" data-href="${window.STATIC_PREFIX}${c.href}" data-idx="${results.indexOf(c)}">
64	            <strong>${c.label}</strong><small>${c.sub || ''}</small></a>`);
65	        });
66	      }
67	      dropdown.innerHTML = parts.join('');
68	      dropdown.hidden = false;
69	
70	      dropdown.querySelectorAll('.search-item').forEach(el => {
71	        el.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
72	          e.preventDefault();
73	          if (el.dataset.href) window.location.href = el.dataset.href;
74	        });
75	        el.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
76	          dropdown.querySelectorAll('.search-item').forEach(x => x.classList.remove('active'));
77	          el.classList.add('active');
78	          activeIdx = parseInt(el.dataset.idx || -1, 10);
79	        });
80	      });
81	    }
82	
83	    let debounce;
84	    input.addEventListener('input', () => {
85	      clearTimeout(debounce);
86	      debounce = setTimeout(() => {
87	        render(filter(input.value));
88	      }, 80);
89	    });
90	
91	    input.addEventListener('focus', () => {
92	      if (input.value) render(filter(input.value));
93	    });
94	
95	    document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
96	      if (!e.target.closest('.search-box') && !e.target.closest('.hero-search-box')) {
97	        dropdown.hidden = true;
98	      }
99	    });
100	
101	    input.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
102	      if (!currentResults.length) return;
103	      const items = Array.from(dropdown.querySelectorAll('.search-item[data-href]'));
104	      if (e.key === 'ArrowDown') {
105	        e.preventDefault();
106	        activeIdx = Math.min(activeIdx + 1, items.length - 1);
107	        items.forEach(x => x.classList.remove('active'));
108	        if (items[activeIdx]) items[activeIdx].classList.add('active');
109	      } else if (e.key === 'ArrowUp') {
110	        e.preventDefault();
111	        activeIdx = Math.max(activeIdx - 1, 0);
112	        items.forEach(x => x.classList.remove('active'));
113	        if (items[activeIdx]) items[activeIdx].classList.add('active');
114	      } else if (e.key === 'Enter') {
115	        e.preventDefault();
116	        if (items[activeIdx]) window.location.href = items[activeIdx].dataset.href;
117	        else if (items[0]) window.location.href = items[0].dataset.href;
118	      } else if (e.key === 'Escape') {
119	        dropdown.hidden = true;
120	        input.blur();
121	      }
122	    });
123	  }
124	
125	  waitForData(() => {
126	    pairs.forEach(([i, d]) => setupSearch(i, d));
127	  });
128	
129	  // 快捷鍵 '/' 聚焦到第一個可用搜尋框（優先 hero）
130	  document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
131	    if (e.key === '/' && e.target.tagName !== 'INPUT' && e.target.tagName !== 'TEXTAREA') {
132	      e.preventDefault();
133	      const first = document.getElementById('hero-search') || document.getElementById('global-search');
134	      if (first) first.focus();
135	    }
136	  });
137	})();

26	def _safe_float(v):
27	    try:
28	        if v is None or (isinstance(v, float) and pd.isna(v)):
29	            return None
30	        return float(v)
31	    except (TypeError, ValueError):
32	        return None
33	
34	
35	def _safe_str(v):
36	    if v is None or (isinstance(v, float) and pd.isna(v)):
37	        return ""
38	    return str(v).strip()
39	
40	
41	def _roc_to_ad(period: str) -> str:
42	    """'114年' -> '2025年'；'114年上半年' -> '2025上半年'"""
43	    s = _safe_str(period)
44	    if not s:
45	        return ""
46	    import re
47	    m = re.match(r"(\d+)年", s)
48	    if not m:
49	        return s
50	    yr = int(m.group(1)) + 1911
51	    rest = s[m.end():]
52	    return f"{yr}{rest}" if rest else f"{yr}"
53

### 3. **Strength Metric Definition**

**Function:** `compute_topic_return_series()` (lines 718-749 in `build_site.py`)

**Logic:**
1. Extract constituent symbols from theme members (line 722)
2. Pull 6-month daily close data (line 725): `sub = close[cols].iloc[-(days+1):]`
3. **Equal-weight portfolio returns** (lines 728-735):
   ```python
   daily_rets = sub.pct_change().dropna(axis=0, how='all')  # skipna per stock
   port_rets = daily_rets.mean(axis=1, skipna=True)  # mean across stocks
   cum = (1 + port_rets).cumprod() - 1  # cumulative return
   ```
4. **Trailing returns** (lines 736-748):

717	
718	def compute_topic_return_series(d: dict, members: list, days=125) -> dict | None:
719	    """計算族群當成等權重組合的 6 個月累積報酬曲線 + 近 1D/1W/1M 報酬。
720	    days=125 ≈ 6 個月交易日。回傳 dates, returns(%), ret_1d, ret_5d, ret_20d 全是百分比。"""
721	    close = d["close"]
722	    cols = [c for c in members if c in close.columns]
723	    if not cols:
724	        return None
725	    sub = close[cols].iloc[-(days + 1):]  # 多取一天算首日報酬
726	    if len(sub) < 5:
727	        return None
728	    # 每日各股報酬，跨股等權取平均（skipna 處理個股缺值）
729	    stock_rets = sub.pct_change()
730	    port_rets = stock_rets.mean(axis=1, skipna=True).fillna(0)
731	    # 第一列是首日，accum 起點 0
732	    port_rets.iloc[0] = 0
733	    cum = (1 + port_rets).cumprod() - 1
734	
735	    # 近 1D/5D/20D 投組報酬（組合日報酬乘積）
736	    def trailing(n):
737	        if len(port_rets) < n + 1:
738	            return None
739	        return float((1 + port_rets.iloc[-n:]).prod() - 1)
740	
741	    return {
742	        "dates":   [t.strftime("%Y-%m-%d") for t in cum.index],
743	        "values":  [round(float(v) * 100, 2) for v in cum.values],
744	        "ret_1d":  round(float(port_rets.iloc[-1] * 100), 2) if len(port_rets) else None,
745	        "ret_1w":  round(trailing(5)  * 100, 2) if trailing(5)  is not None else None,
746	        "ret_1m":  round(trailing(20) * 100, 2) if trailing(20) is not None else None,
747	        "ret_3m":  round(trailing(60) * 100, 2) if trailing(60) is not None else None,
748	        "ret_6m":  round(trailing(125) * 100, 2) if trailing(125) is not None else None,
749	    }
750	
751	
752	def compute_company_chart(d: dict, sym: str, days=240) -> dict | None:
753	    """技術分析：240 日 OHLCV + MA5/10/20/60 + Bollinger(20,2σ) + KD(9)。無資料回 None"""
754	    close = d["close"]
755	    if sym not in close.columns:
756	        return None
757	    try:
758	        c = close[sym].dropna()
759	        if len(c) < 5:
760	            return None
761	        # 暖機：多抓 60 日算指標，顯示只給 days 天
762	        lookback = min(len(c), days + 60)
763	        end_idx = len(c)
764	        start_idx = max(0, end_idx - lookback)
765	        idx = c.index[start_idx:end_idx]
766	        o  = d["open"][sym].reindex(idx)
767	        h  = d["high"][sym].reindex(idx)
768	        l  = d["low"][sym].reindex(idx)
769	        cc = d["close"][sym].reindex(idx)
770	        v  = d["volume"][sym].reindex(idx)
771	
772	        # 均線
773	        ma5  = cc.rolling(5).mean()
774	        ma10 = cc.rolling(10).mean()
775	        ma20 = cc.rolling(20).mean()
776	        ma60 = cc.rolling(60).mean()
777	
778	        # Bollinger Bands (20, 2σ)
779	        std20 = cc.rolling(20).std()
780	        bb_up = ma20 + 2 * std20
781	        bb_lo = ma20 - 2 * std20
782	
783	        # KD 指標 (9)
784	        low9  = l.rolling(9).min()
785	        high9 = h.rolling(9).max()
786	        rng   = (high9 - low9).replace(0, np.nan)
787	        rsv   = (cc - low9) / rng * 100
788	        k_list, d_list = [], []
789	        prev_k, prev_d = 50.0, 50.0
790	        for i in range(len(rsv)):
791	            r = rsv.iloc[i]
792	            if pd.isna(r):
793	                k_list.append(None)
794	                d_list.append(None)
795	                continue
796	            prev_k = (2/3) * prev_k + (1/3) * float(r)
797	            prev_d = (2/3) * prev_d + (1/3) * prev_k
798	            k_list.append(round(prev_k, 2))
799	            d_list.append(round(prev_d, 2))
```
</details></tool-use>

</section>

  {% endfor %}
</div>

<section class="topic-grid">
  {% for g in groups %}
  {% set meta = get_meta(g) %}

      </div>

      <div class="topic-card-stats">

```text
{% extends "base.html" %}
{% set page = "today" %}
{% block title %}今日焦點 · 台股產業寶{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<section class="hero">
  <h1>今日焦點 <small>{{ last_date }}</small></h1>
  <p>當日強弱族群、資金集中度、漲停家數與個股漲跌幅榜。點擊題材或個股可深入查看詳情。</p>
</section>

<section class="section-block">
  <header class="section-head">
    <h2 class="section-title">族群強弱</h2>
    <p class="section-sub">按成分股平均漲跌幅排序</p>
  </header>

  <div class="grid-2col">
    <div class="panel">
      <div class="panel-header">
        <h2>今日強勢題材</h2>
        <span class="muted">按成分股平均漲幅</span>
      </div>
      <table class="table compact">
        <thead><tr><th>題材</th><th>今日</th><th>5日</th><th>20日</th><th>資金</th></tr></thead>
        <tbody>
          {% for g, m in top_gain[:10] %}
          {% set meta = get_meta(g) %}
          <tr>
            <td><a href="topic/{{ g|slugify }}.html" class="topic-chip" style="border-color:{{ meta.color }}; color:{{ meta.color }};">{{ g }}</a></td>
            <td class="{% if m.ret_1d_mean > 0 %}positive{% else %}negative{% endif %}">{{ m.ret_1d_mean|pct }}</td>
            <td class="{% if m.ret_5d_mean > 0 %}positive{% else %}negative{% endif %}">{{ m.ret_5d_mean|pct }}</td>
            <td class="{% if m.ret_20d_mean > 0 %}positive{% else %}negative{% endif %}">{{ m.ret_20d_mean|pct }}</td>
            <td>{{ m.amount_sum_mn|fmt_amount }}</td>
          </tr>
          {% endfor %}
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>

    <div class="panel">
      <div class="panel-header">
        <h2>今日弱勢題材</h2>
        <span class="muted">按成分股平均跌幅</span>
      </div>
      <table class="table compact">
        <thead><tr><th>題材</th><th>今日</th><th>5日</th><th>20日</th><th>資金</th></tr></thead>
        <tbody>
          {% for g, m in top_loss[:10] %}
          {% set meta = get_meta(g) %}
          <tr>
            <td><a href="topic/{{ g|slugify }}.html" class="topic-chip" style="border-color:{{ meta.color }}; color:{{ meta.color }};">{{ g }}</a></td>
            <td class="{% if m.ret_1d_mean > 0 %}positive{% else %}negative{% endif %}">{{ m.ret_1d_mean|pct }}</td>
            <td class="{% if m.ret_5d_mean > 0 %}positive{% else %}negative{% endif %}">{{ m.ret_5d_mean|pct }}</td>
            <td class="{% if m.ret_20d_mean > 0 %}positive{% else %}negative{% endif %}">{{ m.ret_20d_mean|pct }}</td>
            <td>{{ m.amount_sum_mn|fmt_amount }}</td>
          </tr>
          {% endfor %}
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="grid-2col">
    <div class="panel">
      <div class="panel-header"><h2>資金集中排行</h2><span class="muted">當日題材成交額</span></div>
      <div class="bar-list">
        {% set max_amt = top_flow[0][1].amount_sum_mn if top_flow else 1 %}
        {% for g, m in top_flow[:12] %}
        {% set meta = get_meta(g) %}
        <a class="bar-row" href="topic/{{ g|slugify }}.html">
          <span class="bar-label">{{ g }}</span>
          <span class="bar-track">
            <span class="bar-fill" style="width:{{ (m.amount_sum_mn/max_amt*100)|round(1) }}%; background:{{ meta.color }};"></span>
          </span>
          <span class="bar-value">{{ m.amount_sum_mn|fmt_amount }}</span>
        </a>
        {% endfor %}
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="panel">
      <div class="panel-header"><h2>漲停家數最多</h2><span class="muted">族群輪動領頭</span></div>
      <div class="bar-list">
        {% set max_lu = top_limit[0][1].n_limit_up if top_limit and top_limit[0][1].n_limit_up > 0 else 1 %}
        {% for g, m in top_limit[:12] %}
        {% if m.n_limit_up > 0 %}
        {% set meta = get_meta(g) %}
        <a class="bar-row" href="topic/{{ g|slugify }}.html">
          <span class="bar-label">{{ g }}</span>
          <span class="bar-track">
            <span class="bar-fill" style="width:{{ (m.n_limit_up/max_lu*100)|round(1) }}%; background:#dc2626;"></span>
          </span>
          <span class="bar-value">{{ m.n_limit_up }} 檔</span>
        </a>
        {% endif %}
        {% endfor %}
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```
</details></tool-use>

## Section B — F1 Topics overview block

**Card data shape** (passed as new `system_topics` list):

Each card shows: name, count badge, top-3 stock chips, click → detail page.

**Detail pages — reuse `topic_detail.html`.** It is generic. Each member row shows that stock's themes via existing `company_topics[sym]` rendering — yes, keep this; it answers F1.5.

**Build pipeline changes — `site/build_site.py`, in `render_all()` around line 1690 (just before `topics_html = ...`):**

1. Compute three member lists from `stock_metrics`:
   ```python

## Section C — F2 成值分析 on today.html

## Section D — F3 Compare with individual stocks

**Stock subset (payload control).** Pre-computing 6-month series for all ~1800 stocks would balloon `compare.html` (~1800 × 126 floats ≈ 1MB+ inline JSON). **Pick top 200 by `amount_mn`** — covers virtually any stock a user would actually want to compare, keeps payload ~120KB. Make this a constant `STOCK_COMPARE_TOPN = 200` near the top of `build_site.py`.

**Pipeline (build_site.py around line 1782):**
```python
top_syms = stock_metrics.sort_values("amount_mn", ascending=False).head(STOCK_COMPARE_TOPN).index
all_stock_series = {}
all_stock_meta = {}
for s in top_syms:
    series = compute_topic_return_series(data, [s], days=125)
    if not series: continue
    all_stock_series[s] = series
    primary_topics = (company_topics.get(s) or [])[:2]
    all_stock_meta[s] = {"name": name_map.get(s, s), "topics": primary_topics, "industry": data["industry_map"].get(s,"")}
```
Pass into `compare.html` render as two new kwargs: `stock_series_json`, `stock_meta_json`. Inject as `window.STOCK_SERIES` / `window.STOCK_META` in the existing inline-JSON pattern already used for topics.

**Confirm `compute_topic_return_series` works for single-symbol.** Reading lines 718–749: `cols = [c for c in members if c in close.columns]` works for 1-element list; `sub.pct_change()` then `.mean(axis=1, skipna=True)` over 1 column = that column's daily return; cum-product gives that stock's 6M cumulative %. Correct, no change needed. Strength curve and theme curve share identical math/scale → safe to overlay.

**UI changes in `compare.html`:**

1. **Search / picker.** Existing `Object.keys(window.TOPIC_SERIES)` flat list. Replace with a unified picker: section header "題材" then theme rows, section header "個股" then stock rows. Each row carries `data-kind="topic|stock"` and `data-key`. Filter input matches against name + symbol + topic-name.
2. **Chips.** Themes keep `meta.color` accent. Stocks render with neutral grey border + small monospace symbol prefix `#2330` and stock name. Visually distinct without clashing.
3. **URL params.** Extend existing `?topics=...` parser. Add `?stocks=2330,2454`. Both arrays merged into a single `selected = [{kind,key},...]` model. Update on every add/remove via `history.replaceState`.
4. **Period table.** Single tbody, mixed rows. Add a left-most column "類型" showing 題材 / 個股 chip. Sort default = order of selection.
5. **Max selection.** Recommend **5 mixed total** (simplest UX, matches current cognitive limit, prevents legend chaos). Show counter "已選 3 / 5". Don't split quotas — users will hate hitting "5/5 themes" while having stock slots free.
6. **Series rendering.** ECharts `series` array maps over `selected`; lookup table is `kind === 'topic' ? TOPIC_SERIES : STOCK_SERIES`. Color: topic → `meta.color`; stock → palette `['#94a3b8','#cbd5e1','#a3a3a3','#71717a','#525252']` cycled.

Function `compute_topic_return_series(d, members, days=125)` at lines 718-749 of build_site.py. Computes equal-weight portfolio cumulative return. 560	# ═══════════════════════════════════════════

564	def compute_stock_metrics(d: dict) -> pd.DataFrame:
565	    """個股多時間維度指標。回傳 index=symbol, columns=[ret_1d, ret_5d, ret_20d, amount, ...]"""
566	    close = d["close"]
567	    amount = d["amount"]
568	    foreign = d["foreign"]
569	    trust = d["trust"]
570	
571	    last = close.iloc[-1]
572	    prev = close.iloc[-2]
573	    ret_1d = (last - prev) / prev
574	
575	    # 5日、20日報酬
576	    ret_5d  = (last - close.iloc[-6])  / close.iloc[-6]  if len(close) >= 6  else pd.Series(dtype=float)
577	    ret_20d = (last - close.iloc[-21]) / close.iloc[-21] if len(close) >= 21 else pd.Series(dtype=float)
578	
579	    # 漲停旗標（收盤 >= 前日 * 1.095 粗估，簡化版）
580	    limit_up = (ret_1d >= 0.095).fillna(False)
581	    limit_down = (ret_1d <= -0.095).fillna(False)
582	
583	    # 今日成交金額（百萬元）
584	    amt_last = amount.iloc[-1] / 1_000_000 if amount is not None else pd.Series(dtype=float)
585	
586	    df = pd.DataFrame({
587	        "close":      last,
588	        "ret_1d":     ret_1d,
589	        "ret_5d":     ret_5d,
590	        "ret_20d":    ret_20d,
591	        "limit_up":   limit_up,
592	        "limit_down": limit_down,
593	        "amount_mn":  amt_last,
594	    })
595	
596	    # 法人
597	    if foreign is not None and not foreign.empty:
598	        foreign_last = foreign.iloc[-1] / 1000  # 張
599	        foreign_5d_sum = foreign.iloc[-5:].sum() / 1000
600	        df["foreign_1d"] = foreign_last
601	        df["foreign_5d"] = foreign_5d_sum
602	    else:
603	        df["foreign_1d"] = 0.0
604	        df["foreign_5d"] = 0.0
605	
606	    if trust is not None and not trust.empty:
607	        trust_last = trust.iloc[-1] / 1000
608	        trust_5d_sum = trust.iloc[-5:].sum() / 1000
609	        df["trust_1d"] = trust_last
610	        df["trust_5d"] = trust_5d_sum
611	    else:
612	        df["trust_1d"] = 0.0
613	        df["trust_5d"] = 0.0
614	
615	    return df

618	def compute_group_metrics(stock_metrics: pd.DataFrame) -> dict:
619	    """每個族群的彙總指標。回傳 dict: group_name -> summary"""
620	    result = {}
621	    for group, members in CONCEPT_GROUPS.items():
622	        rows = stock_metrics.loc[stock_metrics.index.intersection(members)]
623	        if rows.empty:
624	            continue
625	        result[group] = {
626	            "members":        list(rows.index),
627	            "n_stocks":       len(rows),
628	            "ret_1d_mean":    float(rows["ret_1d"].mean(skipna=True) or 0),
629	            "ret_1d_median":  float(rows["ret_1d"].median(skipna=True) or 0),
630	            "ret_5d_mean":    float(rows["ret_5d"].mean(skipna=True) or 0),
631	            "ret_20d_mean":   float(rows["ret_20d"].mean(skipna=True) or 0),
632	            "amount_sum_mn":  float(rows["amount_mn"].sum(skipna=True) or 0),
633	            "n_limit_up":     int(rows["limit_up"].sum()),
634	            "n_limit_down":   int(rows["limit_down"].sum()),
635	            "n_foreign_buy":  int((rows["foreign_1d"] > 0).sum()),
636	            "n_trust_buy":    int((rows["trust_1d"] > 0).sum()),
637	            "top_stock":      rows["ret_1d"].idxmax() if not rows["ret_1d"].isna().all() else None,
638	            "worst_stock":    rows["ret_1d"].idxmin() if not rows["ret_1d"].isna().all() else None,
639	        }
640	    return result
641	
642	
643	def compute_related_topics(top_n=5) -> dict:
644	    """以共同成分股推導相關題材。每檔股票是一個 bag，兩族群的 Jaccard 相似度"""
645	    groups = {g: set(m) for g, m in CONCEPT_GROUPS.items()}

675	def compute_category_aggregates(stock_metrics: pd.DataFrame, group_metrics: dict) -> list:
676	    """彙總每個 category 層級資料：成分股（去重）、總成交額、平均漲跌、代表題材 Top 3、顏色"""
677	    cat_groups = defaultdict(list)

681

684	        # 該 category 下 unique 成分股
685	        unique_syms = set()
686	        for g in groups:
687	            unique_syms.update(CONCEPT_GROUPS[g])
688	        unique_syms &= set(stock_metrics.index)
689	        if not unique_syms:
690	            continue
691	        rows = stock_metrics.loc[list(unique_syms)]
692	        total_amt = float(rows["amount_mn"].sum(skipna=True) or 0)
693	        # 加權平均（以成交額加權）
694	        if total_amt > 0:
695	            cat_ret = float((rows["ret_1d"] * rows["amount_mn"]).sum(skipna=True) / total_amt)
696	        else:
697	            cat_ret = float(rows["ret_1d"].mean(skipna=True) or 0)
698	        # 代表題材：該 category 下按成交額排序取 Top 3
699	        top_groups = sorted(
700	            [(g, group_metrics.get(g, {}).get("amount_sum_mn", 0)) for g in groups],
701	            key=lambda x: -x[1],
702	        )[:3]
703	        top_names = [g for g, _ in top_groups]
704	        # color 用 CATEGORY_COLORS
705	        result.append({
706	            "name":        cat,
707	            "n_groups":    len(groups),
708	            "n_stocks":    len(unique_syms),
709	            "total_amt":   total_amt,
710	            "ret_mean":    cat_ret,
711	            "top_groups":  top_names,
712	            "color":       CATEGORY_COLORS.get(cat, "#64748b"),
713	        })
714	    result.sort(key=lambda x: -x["total_amt"])
715	    return result

718	def compute_topic_return_series(d: dict, members: list, days=125) -> dict | None:
719	    """計算族群當成等權重組合的 6 個月累積報酬曲線 + 近 1D/1W/1M 報酬。
720	    days=125 ≈ 6 個月交易日。回傳 dates, returns(%), ret_1d, ret_5d, ret_20d 全是百分比。"""
721	    close = d["close"]
722	    cols = [c for c in members if c in close.columns]
723	    if not cols:
724	        return None
725	    sub = close[cols].iloc[-(days + 1):]  # 多取一天算首日報酬
726	    if len(sub) < 5:
727	        return None
728	    # 每日各股報酬，跨股等權取平均（skipna 處理個股缺值）
729	    stock_rets = sub.pct_change()
730	    port_rets = stock_rets.mean(axis=1, skipna=True).fillna(0)
731	    # 第一列是首日，accum 起點 0
732	    port_rets.iloc[0] = 0
733	    cum = (1 + port_rets).cumprod() - 1
734	
735	    # 近 1D/5D/20D 投組報酬（組合日報酬乘積）
736	    def trailing(n):
737	        if len(port_rets) < n + 1:
738	            return None
739	        return float((1 + port_rets.iloc[-n:]).prod() - 1)
740	
741	    return {
742	        "dates":   [t.strftime("%Y-%m-%d") for t in cum.index],
743	        "values":  [round(float(v) * 100, 2) for v in cum.values],
744	        "ret_1d":  round(float(port_rets.iloc[-1] * 100), 2) if len(port_rets) else None,
745	        "ret_1w":  round(trailing(5)  * 100, 2) if trailing(5)  is not None else None,
746	        "ret_1m":  round(trailing(20) * 100, 2) if trailing(20) is not None else None,
747	        "ret_3m":  round(trailing(60) * 100, 2) if trailing(60) is not None else None,
748	        "ret_6m":  round(trailing(125) * 100, 2) if trailing(125) is not None else None,
749	    }

756	        return None

# Implementation Plan — 3-Feature Upgrade

## Section A — Restore corrupted Jinja templates (do this first)

1. From repo root, recover both files from the initial commit and stage them:
   ```
   git show 40e17431:site/templates/topics.html > site/templates/topics.html
   git show 40e17431:site/templates/today.html  > site/templates/today.html
   ```
2. Diff sanity-check vs the rendered HTML currently in `site/dist/topics.html` and `site/dist/today.html` to confirm the recovered files contain `{% ... %}` / `{{ ... }}` blocks (not pure HTML).
3. Re-run `python site/build_site.py` (full build), open `site/dist/topics.html` and `site/dist/today.html`, eyeball-compare against last good output. If layouts match within ±whitespace, baseline is restored.
4. Commit the restored templates as a standalone commit — "restore Jinja sources for topics/today" — before any feature work, so feature diffs stay reviewable.
5. Add a `.gitignore`-style guard (out of scope for this PR, mention in F): the `auto rebuild` job is overwriting templates because something is rendering then writing back to `site/templates/`. Track down and stop that — but only after restoration.

## Section B — F1 Topics overview block

**Placement.** Insert a `<section class="overview-panel">` in `topics.html` immediately after the page hero/header and **before** the existing category filter + topic-grid. Title: 「總覽」, subtitle 「系統指標題材」. Three flex-row cards inside.

**Card data shape** (passed as new `system_topics` list):
```python
[
  {"slug":"top-value-20","name":"每日成交值前20","count":20,"top":[(sym,name,amt_mn),...3],"href":"topic/system/top-value-20.html","accent":"#3b82f6"},
  {"slug":"limit-up",   "name":"每日漲停",       "count":N, "top":[...], "href":"topic/system/limit-up.html","accent":"#ef4444"},
  {"slug":"limit-down", "name":"每日跌停",       "count":M, "top":[...], "href":"topic/system/limit-down.html","accent":"#22c55e"},
]
```
Each card shows: name, count badge, top-3 stock chips, click → detail page.

**Detail pages — reuse `topic_detail.html`.** It is generic. Synthesise a "fake group" context per system tag: `group="每日成交值前20"`, `meta={category:"系統指標", color:"#3b82f6"}`, `stocks=` filtered & sorted DataFrame, `summary=` aggregate computed the same way as `compute_group_metrics` for that member set, `topic_series_json=compute_topic_return_series(data, members, days=125)`, `related=[]`, `ai_summary=None`. Each member row shows that stock's themes via existing `company_topics[sym]` rendering — yes, keep this; it answers F1.5.

**Build pipeline changes — `site/build_site.py`, in `render_all()` around line 1690 (just before `topics_html = ...`):**

1. Compute three member lists from `stock_metrics`:
   ```python
   top_value_syms  = stock_metrics.sort_values("amount_mn", ascending=False).head(20).index.tolist()
   limit_up_syms   = stock_metrics.index[stock_metrics["limit_up"]].tolist()
   limit_down_syms = stock_metrics.index[stock_metrics["limit_down"]].tolist()
   SYSTEM_TOPICS = [("top-value-20","每日成交值前20","#3b82f6",top_value_syms), ...]
   ```
2. Build `system_topics` overview list (with top-3 preview + counts) and pass into `topics.html`.
3. Loop over `SYSTEM_TOPICS`, render `topic_detail.html` for each, write to `dist/topic/system/{slug}.html` (new `system/` subdir under `topic/`). Mirrors the existing `for group, members in CONCEPT_GROUPS.items()` loop at line 1750 — extract a small helper `_render_topic_detail(group_name, members, meta, ...)` and call it from both loops to avoid duplication.
4. Pass each system topic's `topic_series` into the dict that compare.html ingests so they're also selectable in F3 (optional; recommend yes — covered in D below).

**Note on existing `limit-up.html`:** That page is the multi-day漲停 historical analysis, different scope. Keep it. New `topic/system/limit-up.html` is just "today's 漲停". Different routes, different purposes.

## Section C — F2 成值分析 on today.html

**Placement.** Insert a new `<section id="value-analysis">` in `today.html` immediately after the existing `top_flow` block (which is "資金流入 Top"), and before `top_limit`. This keeps "money-flow / value / limit-up" as a coherent block.

**Layout.** Full-width panel (not 2-col grid) — top-30 needs horizontal room for tag chips. Use the same `.panel` styling as `top_gain` table.

**Data shape passed as `top_value`** (new context var, ~30 rows):
```python
top_value = stock_metrics.sort_values("amount_mn", ascending=False).head(30)
# template iterates rows; uses existing name_map[sym] + company_topics[sym]
```

**Columns** (table): rank │ 代號 │ 名稱(linked to `company/{sym}.html`) │ 成交值(百萬) │ 漲跌(色標) │ 題材標籤. Tag chips reuse existing `.topic-tag` CSS already used elsewhere on today.html for `top_limit` rows.

**Build change.** In `render_all()` around line 1677, add `top_value=stock_metrics.sort_values("amount_mn", ascending=False).head(30)` to the `today.html` render call kwargs. Template loops over `top_value.itertuples()`.

## Section D — F3 Compare with individual stocks

**Stock subset (payload control).** Pre-computing 6-month series for all ~1800 stocks would balloon `compare.html` (~1800 × 126 floats ≈ 1MB+ inline JSON). **Pick top 200 by `amount_mn`** — covers virtually any stock a user would actually want to compare, keeps payload ~120KB. Make this a constant `STOCK_COMPARE_TOPN = 200` near the top of `build_site.py`.

**Pipeline (build_site.py around line 1782):**
```python
top_syms = stock_metrics.sort_values("amount_mn", ascending=False).head(STOCK_COMPARE_TOPN).index
all_stock_series = {}
all_stock_meta = {}
for s in top_syms:
    series = compute_topic_return_series(data, [s], days=125)
    if not series: continue
    all_stock_series[s] = series
    primary_topics = (company_topics.get(s) or [])[:2]
    all_stock_meta[s] = {"name": name_map.get(s, s), "topics": primary_topics, "industry": data["industry_map"].get(s,"")}
```
Pass into `compare.html` render as two new kwargs: `stock_series_json`, `stock_meta_json`. Inject as `window.STOCK_SERIES` / `window.STOCK_META` in the existing inline-JSON pattern already used for topics.

**Confirm `compute_topic_return_series` works for single-symbol.** Reading lines 718–749: `cols = [c for c in members if c in close.columns]` works for 1-element list; `sub.pct_change()` then `.mean(axis=1, skipna=True)` over 1 column = that column's daily return; cum-product gives that stock's 6M cumulative %. Correct, no change needed. Strength curve and theme curve share identical math/scale → safe to overlay.

**UI changes in `compare.html`:**

1. **Search / picker.** Existing `Object.keys(window.TOPIC_SERIES)` flat list. Replace with a unified picker: section header "題材" then theme rows, section header "個股" then stock rows. Each row carries `data-kind="topic|stock"` and `data-key`. Filter input matches against name + symbol + topic-name.
2. **Chips.** Themes keep `meta.color` accent. Stocks render with neutral grey border + small monospace symbol prefix `#2330` and stock name. Visually distinct without clashing.
3. **URL params.** Extend existing `?topics=...` parser. Add `?stocks=2330,2454`. Both arrays merged into a single `selected = [{kind,key},...]` model. Update on every add/remove via `history.replaceState`.
4. **Period table.** Single tbody, mixed rows. Add a left-most column "類型" showing 題材 / 個股 chip. Sort default = order of selection.
5. **Max selection.** Recommend **5 mixed total** (simplest UX, matches current cognitive limit, prevents legend chaos). Show counter "已選 3 / 5". Don't split quotas — users will hate hitting "5/5 themes" while having stock slots free.
6. **Series rendering.** ECharts `series` array maps over `selected`; lookup table is `kind === 'topic' ? TOPIC_SERIES : STOCK_SERIES`. Color: topic → `meta.color`; stock → palette `['#94a3b8','#cbd5e1','#a3a3a3','#71717a','#525252']` cycled.

## Section E — Verification

1. **Build:** `python site/build_site.py` from repo root. Confirm zero exceptions; check console "✓ 漲停分析頁..." style log lines for the 3 new system pages.
2. **File presence:** `ls site/dist/topic/system/` should show `top-value-20.html`, `limit-up.html`, `limit-down.html`. `site/dist/topics.html` should exist and contain string `"總覽"` and `"系統指標題材"`. `site/dist/today.html` should contain `"成值分析"`. `site/dist/compare.html` should contain `window.STOCK_SERIES`.

   - `dist/topics.html`: overview panel renders 3 cards above category grid; click each → detail page loads, ECharts curve renders, stock table shows theme tags per row.

   - `dist/compare.html`: search box → type "2330" finds 台積電; type "AI" finds AI 題材topics; mix 2 themes + 2 stocks → 4 lines on chart, period table shows 4 rows with type chips; reload with `?topics=AI,半導體&stocks=2330` → state restored.
4. **Regression:** existing 6 compare scenarios with topics-only still work; period table numbers unchanged.

## Section F — Risks & open questions for user

1. **Stock series payload.** 200-stock cap is opinionated. If user expects all ~1800 selectable, plan needs an async fetch of `data/stock_series/{sym}.json` instead of inline. Confirm 200 is acceptable.
2. **System-tag detail page slug naming.** Plan uses `topic/system/top-value-20.html`. Alternative: `topic/system/daily-top-value.html`. User wording was "每日成交值前 20" — confirm slug.
3. **Per-day persistence.** 漲停/跌停 lists change daily. The build only generates "today's snapshot". Confirm user does NOT want historical archives at `topic/system/limit-up/2026-04-25.html`. (The existing multi-day `limit-up.html` already serves history — recommend NOT duplicating.)
4. **Mixed max-5.** Confirm 5-mixed vs 5+5 split. I'd push for 5-mixed; user may prefer 5+5.
5. **System tags inside compare.** Should the 3 system tags appear as selectable "topics" in compare.html dropdown? My recommendation: yes (cheap, useful — user can compare "每日漲停" vs a theme). Confirm.
6. **Auto-rebuild template overwrite.** This corrupted `topics.html`/`today.html` once already. Out-of-scope for this PR but should be filed as a follow-up — tracking down what writes back to `site/templates/`.

**F3 個股加入對比時，要支援多少檔股票可選？**

- **全部約 1800 檔（非同步載入）** - 為每檔股票產一個 dist/data/stock_series/{sym}.json，使用者選股時 fetch 載入。完整覆蓋但要多寫 fetch 邏輯與 1800 個小檔案。

**F3 對比頁的選擇上限要怎麼設？**

```md
# 題材系統三件套升級

## Context

族群寶（Taiwan Industry Intelligence）是一个台股题材族群追踪静态站。当前痛点：

1. **题材列表（topics.html）只有用户自定义的 184+ 题材**，但「每日成交值前 20 / 每日漲停 / 每日跌停」这三个市场即时信号反而要分散去别页找。要给一个聚合入口。
2. **今日焦點（today.html）已有「資金集中排行」按题材排成交值，但没有按个股看的视角**。需要一个 30 名个股 + 题材标签的「成值分析」面板，回答「钱真正流向哪几档股票，他们在打什么题材」。
3. **題材對比（compare.html）只支援题材曲线，不能加个股**。用户想看「A 题材 vs 台积电」这类强弱对比。

附带一个底层逻辑问题需要先修复：`templates/topics.html` 和 `templates/today.html` 已被 `auto rebuild` 覆盖成纯 HTML（无 Jinja 标签），下次构建会拿不到新数据。必须先从 git 还原。

最终成果：一次构建跑完 → topics 多出一个总览区块、today 多出成值分析、compare 支援全部 1800 档个股异步加载混合对比。

---

## 关键决策（已与用户对齐）

| 决策点 | 选择 |
|---|---|
| F3 个股可选范围 | **全部约 1800 档**，通过 `dist/data/stock_series/{sym}.json` 异步加载 |
| F3 选择上限 | **混合 5**（题材 + 个股 共 5 个） |
| F1 详情页版型 | **复用 `topic_detail.html`**，点卡片进 6 月曲线 + 成份股表格 |
| 模板修复 | **先从 `git show 40e17431:` 还原 Jinja 模板，再施工** |

---

### Step 1 — F1：題材列表加總覽區塊

#### 1.1 `site/build_site.py` — 新增 system topics 计算 + 详情页生成

**位置：** `render_all()` 内，紧接现有 `for group, members in CONCEPT_GROUPS.items():` 循环（line 1750 附近）之后。

**新增逻辑：**

\```python
# 系统题材（每日动态）
SYSTEM_TOPIC_DEFS = [
    ("每日成交值前20", "system-top-value-20", "#3b82f6", "市場資金最集中的 20 檔個股，反映當日主力進場焦點。"),
    ("每日漲停",       "system-limit-up",     "#ef4444", "當日漲停板個股清單，掌握強勢族群輪動領頭羊。"),
    ("每日跌停",       "system-limit-down",   "#22c55e", "當日跌停板個股清單，警惕弱勢族群與風險訊號。"),
]
top_value_syms  = stock_metrics.sort_values("amount_mn", ascending=False).head(20).index.tolist()
limit_up_syms   = stock_metrics.index[stock_metrics["limit_up"].fillna(False)].tolist()
limit_down_syms = stock_metrics.index[stock_metrics["limit_down"].fillna(False)].tolist()
SYSTEM_MEMBERS  = {
    "每日成交值前20": top_value_syms,
    "每日漲停":        limit_up_syms,
    "每日跌停":        limit_down_syms,
}
\```

**渲染详情页：** 复用现有 `tpl_topic.render(...)` 模式（line 1760 附近），将每个 system topic 当作普通题材渲染：

\```python
for sname, slug, color, desc in SYSTEM_TOPIC_DEFS:
    members = SYSTEM_MEMBERS[sname]
    if not members: continue
    rows = stock_metrics.loc[stock_metrics.index.intersection(members)].copy()
    rows["display_name"] = [name_map.get(s, s) if name_map.get(s) else s for s in rows.index]
    rows_sorted = rows.sort_values("amount_mn", ascending=False)
    sys_meta = {"category": "系統指標", "color": color, "desc": desc, "indicators": []}
    sys_summary = {  # 仿照 group_metrics 结构
        "n_stocks": len(rows),
        "ret_1d_mean":  float(rows["ret_1d"].mean()) if len(rows) else 0,
        "ret_5d_mean":  float(rows["ret_5d"].mean()) if len(rows) else 0,
        "ret_20d_mean": float(rows["ret_20d"].mean()) if len(rows) else 0,
        "amount_sum_mn": float(rows["amount_mn"].sum()),
        "n_limit_up":   int(rows["limit_up"].sum()),
        "n_limit_down": int(rows["limit_down"].sum()),
    }
    sys_series = compute_topic_return_series(data, members, days=125)
    html = tpl_topic.render(
        **base_ctx,
        group=sname, meta=sys_meta, stocks=rows_sorted, summary=sys_summary,
        related=[], name_map=name_map, company_topics=company_topics,
        topic_series_json=json.dumps(sys_series, ensure_ascii=False) if sys_series else "null",
        ai_summary=None,
    )
    (topic_dir / f"{slug}.html").write_text(html, encoding="utf-8")
    # 加入 compare 来源（也可以拿来对比）
    if sys_series:
        all_topic_series[sname] = sys_series
        all_topic_meta[sname] = {"category": "系統指標", "color": color, "slug": slug, "n_stocks": len(rows)}
\```

**改 topics.html 渲染入参（line 1692 附近）：**

\```python
system_topics = [
    {"name": sname, "slug": slug, "color": color, "desc": desc,
     "n_stocks": len(SYSTEM_MEMBERS[sname]),
     "amount_sum_mn": float(stock_metrics.loc[stock_metrics.index.intersection(SYSTEM_MEMBERS[sname]), "amount_mn"].sum()),
     "ret_1d_mean": float(stock_metrics.loc[stock_metrics.index.intersection(SYSTEM_MEMBERS[sname]), "ret_1d"].mean() or 0)}
    for sname, slug, color, desc in SYSTEM_TOPIC_DEFS
]
topics_html = env.get_template("topics.html").render(
    **base_ctx, groups=..., group_metrics=..., get_meta=..., categories=...,
    system_topics=system_topics,   # ← 新增
)
\```

#### 1.2 `site/templates/topics.html` — 总览区块模板

<section class="overview-panel">

  </header>

          <div><span class="stat-mini-label">今日均</span><span class="stat-mini-value {% if st.ret_1d_mean > 0 %}positive{% else %}negative{% endif %}">{{ st.ret_1d_mean|pct }}</span></div>
          <div><span class="stat-mini-label">成交值</span><span class="stat-mini-value">{{ st.amount_sum_mn|fmt_amount }}</span></div>

    {% endfor %}
  </div>
</section>

\```jinja
<section class="section-block" id="value-analysis">
  <header class="section-head">
    <h2 class="section-title">成值分析</h2>
    <p class="section-sub">當日成交值前 30 名個股 + 所屬題材，掌握主力資金真實去向</p>
  </header>
  <div class="panel">
    <div class="panel-header">
      <h2>個股成交值排行</h2>
      <span class="muted">點擊個股查看詳情，點擊題材跳轉題材頁</span>
    </div>
    <table class="table compact">
      <thead><tr><th>#</th><th>股票</th><th>成交值</th><th>漲跌</th><th>5 日</th><th>所屬題材</th></tr></thead>
      <tbody>
        {% for sym, row in top_value.iterrows() %}
        <tr>
          <td class="muted">{{ loop.index }}</td>
          <td><a href="company/{{ sym }}.html">{{ row.display_name }} <span class="muted">({{ sym }})</span></a></td>
          <td>{{ row.amount_mn|fmt_amount }}</td>
          <td class="{% if row.ret_1d > 0 %}positive{% else %}negative{% endif %}">{{ row.ret_1d|pct }}</td>
          <td class="{% if row.ret_5d > 0 %}positive{% else %}negative{% endif %}">{{ row.ret_5d|pct }}</td>
          <td>
            {% set tp = company_topics.get(sym, []) %}
            {% if tp %}
              {% for t in tp[:3] %}<a href="topic/{{ t|slugify }}.html" class="tag">{{ t }}</a>{% endfor %}
              {% if tp|length > 3 %}<span class="tag tag-more" title="{{ tp[3:]|join('、') }}">+{{ tp|length-3 }}</span>{% endif %}
            {% else %}
              {% set ind = industry_map.get(sym) %}
              {% if ind %}<span class="tag tag-industry">{{ ind }}</span>{% else %}<span class="muted">—</span>{% endif %}
            {% endif %}
          </td>
        </tr>
        {% endfor %}
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>
</section>
\```
